ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the company was established */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waterways" (
  "waterway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waterway */,
  "waterway_name" TEXT /* Name of the waterway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the waterway */,
  "length_km" REAL /* Length of the waterway in kilometers */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Source location of the waterway */,
  "outlet_location" TEXT /* Outlet location of the waterway */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of waterway (e.g., river, stream, lake) */,
  "pollution_level" TEXT /* Current pollution level of the waterway */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waterway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company managing the site */,
  "waterway_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the waterway associated with the site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the site (latitude and longitude) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Treatment capacity of the site in cubic meters per day */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of water treatment work (e.g., wastewater, drinking water) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the site (e.g., active, maintenance, shutdown) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date the site was commissioned */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date the site was decommissioned (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_waterway_id FOREIGN KEY ("waterway_id") REFERENCES waterways ("waterway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sewage_dumps" (
  "sewage_dump_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sewage dump */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the sewage was dumped */,
  "dump_date" TEXT /* Date of the sewage dump */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of sewage dumped */,
  "pollutant_type" TEXT /* Type of pollutants in the sewage (e.g., organic, inorganic) */,
  "pollutant_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of pollutants in the sewage */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the sewage dump (e.g., maintenance, emergency) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the sewage dump */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the sewage dump */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sewage_dump_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sewage_dumps_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sewage_dumps_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "durations" (
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each duration */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the sewage was released */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the sewage release */,
  "duration_hours" REAL /* Duration of the sewage release in hours */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the sewage release */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the sewage release */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the sewage release (e.g., maintenance, emergency) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the sewage release */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the sewage release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_durations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_durations_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "reporting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site being reported */,
  "reporting_date" TEXT /* Date of the reporting entry */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of reporting for the site */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, reviewed) */,
  "submitted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the report */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_submitted_by FOREIGN KEY ("submitted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., water treatment operator, environmental monitor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role being assigned the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission being granted (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user being assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role being assigned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_entries" (
  "log_entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action being logged (e.g., login, logout, view, edit, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user performing the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_entries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being versioned */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
